wordplay_note: Bonny's daughter with a twin brother living inside her body
card_description: Edie Keller is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. Girl whose dead twin brother Bill lives parasitically inside her body and speaks through her. Name note: Bonny's daughter with a twin brother living inside her body. The dead surviving within the living — PKD's fascination with twinning and death. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: Girl whose dead twin brother Bill lives parasitically inside her body and speaks through her
reference.significance: The dead surviving within the living — PKD's fascination with twinning and death
